case_title: EOWYN, EOWYN C/O TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS SFPD & SF GEN HOSP. (MICHELSON)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,499.00 FILED BY EOWYN, EOWYN C/O TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC AS TO DEFENDANT SFPD & SF GEN HOSP. (MICHELSON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT REQ TO DISMISS CASE FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SFPD & SF GEN HOSP. (MICHELSON)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SFPD & SF GEN HOSP. (MICHELSON) BASED ON COURT RECORDS TO DATE & EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY DEFT CCSF, PLTF HAS FILED MORE THAN 2 S.C. ACTIONS DEMANDING MORE THAN $2500 WITHIN THE CALENDAR YEAR. PLTF IN THIS ACTION DEMANDS $2499 AND UPON EVIDENCE PRESENTED ALSO SEEKS COSTS IN EXCESS OF $2.00. PURSUANT TO CCP 116.231(A) PLTF IS ORDERED TO NOT FILE A SMALL CLAIMS CAUSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
- OF ACTION DEMANDING MORE THAN $2500 WITHIN THE CALENDAR YEAR.
DEFT CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED LESS THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. FEE EXEMPT. TO BE SIGNED BY COMM. ORIGINAL REQUEST IS IN # 811856.
CHALLENGE TO THE COMM: 170.6, FILED BY PLTF.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-02-2005, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-01-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 GRANTED AS CHANGED.
